title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with a single CLI or REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same features as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; runs entirely in Docker with no external dependencies.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and assistant wrapper around the Ollama REST API with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s UI for inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Retrieval-Augmented-Generation stack using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store for fully private Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and model auto-pull.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama (Spring, Android, Kotlin) offering synchronous, reactive and streaming APIs.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that exposes Ollama models to workspace channels via configurable shortcuts and threads.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app (Rust+React) for chatting with Ollama models offline on Windows/Mac/Linux.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# / .NET client with async streaming and dependency-injection friendly interfaces.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-dependent code in pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API with Tokio and SSE support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Chat with note” command using local Ollama models for private AI assistance.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: Native n8n node for calling Ollama chat and completion endpoints inside no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration treating Ollama as both generator and embedder for building retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template that combines Ollama embeddings, LlamaIndex and Chroma for private document Q&A.
